meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Nothing Phone repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Nothing Phone Repair Winnipeg | Glyph & Screen Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Nothing Phone repair in Winnipeg. Screen, Glyph interface, battery repair for Nothing Phone (2), Phone (1) & CMF devices. New brand expertise.
page.heroDescription: Got a Nothing Phone with a cracked screen or Glyph interface issues? We're Winnipeg's experts in Carl Pei's innovative devices.

heroImage.alt: Nothing Phone repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Replace cracked Nothing AMOLED displays while preserving the iconic transparent design.

services.name: Glyph Interface Repair
services.description: Fix LED Glyph lighting issues—restore the signature Nothing experience.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore battery life to your Nothing Phone.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Fix USB-C and wireless charging issues.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Repair stereo speakers for crystal-clear audio.

advantage_pillars.title: Nothing Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Winnipeg's experts in Carl Pei's innovative Nothing devices.

advantage_pillars.title: Glyph Interface Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Specialized repair for the unique LED Glyph lighting system.

advantage_pillars.title: New Brand Pioneers
advantage_pillars.description: Early adopters supporting Nothing devices since day one.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

models_description: We service all Nothing devices including Nothing Phone (1), (2), (2a) and CMF Phone 1.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Nothing Phone repair costs depend on the model and parts availability. Nothing's official support page provides warranty information.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that Nothing repairs can cost as much as other premium Android devices. iFixit's Nothing Phone teardowns reveal the complexity of the transparent design.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense, we'll explain alternatives clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Can you fix the Glyph interface lights on Nothing phones?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're Winnipeg's Glyph interface experts.

faqs.question: Are Nothing phone parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: As a newer brand, some parts require sourcing time. We can typically obtain parts within 2-5 business days.

faqs.question: Is Nothing a good brand worth repairing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Nothing has earned a reputation for innovative design.

faqs.question: Do you repair CMF phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We service the CMF Phone 1.

faqs.question: How long does Nothing Phone repair take?
faqs.answer: If parts are in stock, most repairs take 1-2 hours.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
